reviews.comment:
Muy mala, una hora esperando para cargar combustible y el personal como si no hubiera gente con una tranquilidad como si no hubiera nadie.

(Translated by Google)
Very bad, an hour waiting to refuel and the staff acted as if there were no people around, completely calm as if nobody was there.
